nodes.label: AI for communication tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I don't use any AI models for these kinds of tasks in my daily work, as I prefer to write messages myself

nodes.label: AI for data analysis and ideation
nodes.grounding_span: Tasks such as data management and analysis I do use AI models

nodes.label: AI-generated email quality
nodes.grounding_span: AI-generated models are more often much better written than their human counterparts

nodes.label: Personal touch in communication
nodes.grounding_span: there is a place for personalization and connection

nodes.label: Collaborative AI interaction
nodes.grounding_span: I have preferred the collaborative approach most often

nodes.label: AI for menial tasks
nodes.grounding_span: made me more likely to turn to an AI model to help with menial tasks

nodes.label: AI spotting hidden trends
nodes.grounding_span: AI was able to help me see a slight trend in the data

nodes.label: AI adoption in workplace
nodes.grounding_span: almost all AI being used is through people's personal exploration and usage

nodes.label: Personal connection and authenticity
nodes.grounding_span: there is a place for personalization and connection

nodes.label: Productivity and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: saved me time and/or inspired better results

nodes.label: Learning and understanding
nodes.grounding_span: allow me to learn along with the data analysis

nodes.label: Workplace acceptance and innovation
nodes.grounding_span: My workplace culture is very accepting of AI

nodes.label: Value of personal touch in emails
nodes.grounding_span: a personal touch stands out in the current waves of AI-assisted emails

nodes.label: Preference for collaborative AI approach
nodes.grounding_span: I have preferred the collaborative approach most often

nodes.grounding_span: made me more likely to turn to an AI model to help with menial tasks

nodes.label: Collaborative iterative reasoning

nodes.label: Pattern recognition in communication
nodes.grounding_span: the sheer number of emails that I receive that are AI-assisted makes the patterns stand out
